summary: Tested 3 new features: Bank Account Redeem, Electricity Bill Helper dropdown, and EMI Payment Form. Backend API tests 16/17 passed (94%). Frontend UI testing shows all 3 features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when user_id format might differ between login response and API call

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Failed to load data' toast and 0 PRC balance when first loading, likely due to race condition with user prop

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix BankRedeem page race condition - ensure user prop has uid before API calls
LOW: Consider passing user.uid directly instead of waiting for effect to trigger
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Bank Redeem API - GET /api/bank-redeem/denominations returns 6 correct denominations
✓ 20% admin charge correctly calculated for all denominations
✓ Bank details validation: IFSC 11 chars, Account 8-18 digits
✓ Profile page shows 'Bank Withdrawal' link with data-testid='bank-redeem-link' for paid subscribers
✓ Bank Withdrawal page shows form fields: Account Holder Name, Account Number, Re-enter, IFSC, Bank Name
✓ Important Rules section shows: KYC required, Max 1/week, Fixed amounts ₹100-₹25,000
✓ Electricity Bill dropdown has 64 All India providers grouped by region (Northern, Western, Southern, Eastern, Northeastern)
✓ Major providers available: MSEDCL, BSES Delhi, Adani Mumbai, Tata Power, KSEB, BESCOM
✓ EMI Payment form has all 5 standard fields: Loan Account Number, Bank/NBFC Name, IFSC Code, Borrower Name, Registered Mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Bank Redeem & New Features Testing - Iteration 57:

Backend Tests (16/17 PASSED):
1. TestBankRedeemDenominations (6 tests):

   - Returns 6 denominations ✓
   - Correct amounts (100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 25000) ✓
   - Correct processing fees ✓
   - 20% admin charge ✓
   - Total PRC calculation correct ✓

2. TestBankDetailsAPI (4 tests, 1 minor fail):

   - Validation rejects missing fields ✓
   - IFSC validation requires 11 chars ✓
   - Account validation requires 8-18 digits ✓

3. TestBankRedeemEligibility (3 tests):
   - Eligibility endpoint works ✓
   - Checks bank details ✓
   - Checks KYC status ✓

4. TestBankWithdrawalRequest (2 tests):
   - Validates denominations ✓
   - History endpoint works ✓

5. TestBillPaymentElectricity (1 test):
   - API accepts biller_name in details ✓

6. TestEMIPaymentFormFields (1 test):
   - API accepts all 5 standard EMI fields ✓

Frontend UI Testing:
1. Bank Withdrawal page:
   - Profile shows 'Bank Withdrawal' link for paid subscribers ✓
   - /bank-redeem page loads with form ✓
   - Form has all required fields ✓
   - Shows 'Failed to load data' error - may need fix

2. Electricity Bill form:
   - Tab exists on Bill Payments page ✓
   - Dropdown has 64 providers ✓
   - Providers grouped by region ✓
   - All India coverage confirmed ✓

3. EMI Payment form:
   - Tab exists on Bill Payments page ✓
   - All 5 standard fields present ✓
   - Loan Account Number, Bank/NBFC Name, IFSC, Borrower Name, Registered Mobile ✓
